Common.appName: Shri Veer Patta School Fee Admin
Common.school: Shri Veer Patta Senior Secondary School

Defaulters.title: Outstanding follow-up register
Defaulters.description: Phone-ready overdue list for {session}. Highest risk appears first.
Defaulters.officeNotice: Use this screen for calls and follow-up only. Collect payments from Payment Desk.
Defaulters.filtersDescription: Keep the follow-up list narrow enough for the office team to act on.
Defaulters.metricStudentsListedHint: Students currently matching the selected follow-up filters.
Defaulters.metricPendingAmountHint: Current outstanding balance across listed students.
Defaulters.metricOverdueInstallmentsHint: Installments already past due date and still unpaid. Amounts below show late fee separately.
Defaulters.metricOpenInstallmentsHint: Pending, partial, and overdue installments across the listed rows.
Defaulters.metricMissingDuesHint: Active students whose dues need preparation, not counted as true defaulters.
Defaulters.missingDuesTitle: Students whose dues are not prepared
Defaulters.missingDuesDescription: These active students are not treated as defaulters yet. Prepare dues before collection or follow-up.
Defaulters.listDescription: Ranked by pending amount and overdue days so the highest-risk follow-ups appear first.
Defaulters.emptyDefaulters: No defaulters found for the selected filters.
Defaulters.routeTransportDescription: Use this view for transport follow-up and route-level reconciliation work.
Defaulters.routeTransportEmpty: No route-wise outstanding rows for the selected filters.
Defaulters.routeStudentListDescription: Operational student list grouped by route for office calls and overdue follow-up.
Defaulters.routeStudentListEmpty: No route-wise students for the selected filters.
Defaulters.popoverSnoozeHint: If set, this student moves to the "This week" or "Snoozed" tab.
Defaulters.popoverNotePlaceholder: e.g. Will pay by 20th, needs installment breakdown…
Defaulters.voiceNoteUnsupported: Audio recording is not supported in this browser.
Defaulters.voiceNotePermissionDenied: Could not start recording (microphone permission denied?).
Defaulters.whatsappDisclaimer: Copy this text and paste into WhatsApp. The app does not send messages.
Defaulters.bulkSendButton: Send WhatsApp to {count, plural, =1 {# parent} other {# parents}}
Defaulters.bulkSheetTitle: WhatsApp to {count, plural, =1 {# parent} other {# parents}}
Defaulters.bulkSheetDescription: Choose a template, review the preview, then open one WhatsApp draft per parent.
Defaulters.bulkNoTemplates: No active templates. Create one under Admin Tools → WhatsApp templates.
Defaulters.bulkNoPhoneMessage: {count, plural, =1 {# selected parent has} other {# selected parents have}} no phone number on file and will be skipped:
Defaulters.bulkOpenInfo: Confirming will open {count, plural, =1 {# new browser tab} other {# new browser tabs}}, one per parent. Send each manually after reviewing.
Defaulters.bulkOpenButton: Open {count, plural, =1 {# WhatsApp tab} other {# WhatsApp tabs}}

Exports.title: Exports
Exports.description: Download Excel files for students, dues, follow-up, and receipts.
Exports.officeNotice: On mobile, downloads may open in your browser or spreadsheet app depending on device settings.
Exports.groupChooseHint: Choose the file that matches the office task.
Exports.itemAllStudentsDetail: Complete student list for office checking.
Exports.itemDiscountStudentsDetail: RTE, staff child, and sibling policy.
Exports.itemClassWiseDuesDetail: Class totals and pending fee review.
Exports.itemDefaultersDetail: Follow-up list for pending and overdue dues.
Exports.itemReceiptRegisterDetail: Saved receipt records for office accounts.
Exports.itemAiContextBundleDetail: Multi-sheet workbook with students, installments, payments, classes, routes, discounts, defaulters and a README. Large file — may take 10–20 seconds to generate.
